select fa.FA_NUM from 
ccal_repl_owner.txn t
LEFT JOIN ccsi_owner.AR_GRP_SUBDIM fa ON t.AR_ID = fa.AR_ID
and t.td >= fa.EFF_DT
and t.td < fa.END_DT;

Derive based on OWN_FA_NUM field.

left join SSDS_DAL_OWNER.FA_NUMBER_V fn on fn.FA_NUMBER = OWN_FA_NUM
and t.td >= fn.EFF_DT
AND t.td < fn.END_DT

Derive based on OWN_FA_NUM_ENT_CD field.

LEFT JOIN SSDS_DAL_OWNER.ENTERPRISE_ENTITY_DIM_V e
ON e.Entity_code_long = OWN_FA_NUM_ENT_CD
AND t.td >= e.EFF_DT 
AND t.td < e.END_DT
AND e.ENTITY_RECYCLED_BOOLEAN='0'
AND e.ENTITY_FINANCIAL_RIA_BOOLEAN = '0'

join ccal_repl_owner.apa apa on apa.exec_id = t.txn_id
 
WHEN txn.src_stm_id = 5 (RJBNK1) and apa.ac_id is not null (NOTE: APA on ESP activity is always APACSH defined on [ETL Notes] tab)
THEN
left join ccsi_owner.ar_ac_subdim aas ON 
aas.ar_id = t.ar_id 
AND aas.dep_ac_setup_id = apa.ac_id
and aas.eff_dt <= t.td
and aas.end_dt > t.td
use aas.AC_NUM
ELSE

If TXN.SRC_STM_ID in (25, 94) --STSR or STSR2
and TXN.TXN_TP_ID not in (14, 1856) -- not Fund Trades
and FIP.FIP_TP_ID in (123, 160) --FIPCOM01, FIPCOM91
Then move STM_BASE_CCY_AMT

If TXN.SRC_STM_ID in (25, 94) --STSR or STSR2
and FIP.FIP_TP_ID = 125 (FIPFEE01, Processing (handling) Fee)
Then move STM_BASE_CCY_AMT

If TXN.SRC_STM_ID in (25, 94) --STSR or STSR2
and FIP.FIP_TP_ID = 126 (FIPTAX03, SEC Fee)
Then move STM_BASE_CCY_AMT

If TXN.SRC_STM_ID in (25, 94) --STSR or STSR2
and FIP.FIP_TP_ID = 124 (FIPINT01, Accrued Interest)
Then move STM_BASE_CCY_AMT

If TXN.SRC_STM_ID in (25, 94) --STSR or STSR2
and TXN.TXN_TP_ID in (14, 1856) -- Fund Trades
and FIP.FIP_TP_ID in (123, 160) --FIPCOM01, FIPCOM91
Then move STM_BASE_CCY_AMT

If TXN.SRC_STM_ID in (25, 94) --STSR or STSR2
and TXN.TXN_TP_ID in (14, 1856) -- Fund Trades
and TXN.BUY_SELL_IND = 'Sell'
and FIP.FIP_TP_ID = 132 (FIPFEE02, Miscellaneous Fee(s))
Then
for TXN.SRC_STM_ID = 94 move STM_BASE_CCY_AMT
for TXN.SRC_STM_ID = 25 move OTHR_FEE

If TXN.SRC_STM_ID in (25, 94) --STSR or STSR2
and FIP.FIP_TP_ID = 132 (FIPFEE02, Miscellaneous Fee(s))
Then
for TXN.SRC_STM_ID = 94 move STM_BASE_CCY_AMT
for TXN.SRC_STM_ID = 25 move OTHR_FEE

If there is a record in CCAL_REPL_OWNER.TXN_RLTNP table with TXN.TXN_ID = TXN_RLTNP.TRGT_TXN_ID
and TXN_RLTNP_TP_ID = 69 (Cancel)
and TXN_RLTNP.TRGT_TXN_ID <> TXN_RLTNP.SRC_TXN_ID
then set to 'Y' for both TRGT_TXN_ID and SRC_TXN_ID.

The check should be performed each time when a new record is written into CCAL_REPL_OWNER.TXN_RLTNP with TXN_RLTNP_TP_ID = 69 and update the flag for both TRGT_TXN_ID and SRC_TXN_ID, if TXN_RLTNP.TRGT_TXN_ID <> TXN_RLTNP.SRC_TXN_ID.

Note: TXN_RLTNP.TRGT_TXN_ID <> TXN_RLTNP.SRC_TXN_ID is needed because it is possible that cancellation trade points to itself when the original trade that is being cancelled is not found. In this case Cancelled Flag should not be set to 'Y'

Fetch FA_NUMBER_V.FA_NUMBER_TYPE_CODE As OWN_FA_NUM_TP_CD

LEFT Join with CCAL_REPL_OWNER.TXN TXN With CCSI_OWNER.AR_GRP_SUBDIM AR_GRP_SUBDIM ON TXN.AR_ID = AR_GRP_SUBDIM.AR_ID
And TXN.TD >= AR_GRP_SUBDIM.EFF_DT
And TXN.TD < AR_GRP_SUBDIM.END_DT
Left Join SSDS_DAL_OWNER.FA_NUMBER_V FA_NUMBER_V ON AR_GRP_SUBDIM.FA_NUM = FA_NUMBER_V.FA_NUMBER
And TXN.TD >= FA_NUMBER_V.EFFECTIVE_DATE
And TXN.TD < FA_NUMBER_V.END_DATE

Fetch CODE_SET_VALUE_V.CODE_VALUE_DESCRIPTION As OWN_FA_NUM_TP
 
LEFT Join with CCAL_REPL_OWNER.TXN TXN With CCSI_OWNER.AR_GRP_SUBDIM AR_GRP_SUBDIM ON TXN.AR_ID = AR_GRP_SUBDIM.AR_ID
And TXN.TD >= AR_GRP_SUBDIM.EFF_DT
And TXN.TD < AR_GRP_SUBDIM.END_DT
Left Join SSDS_DAL_OWNER.FA_NUMBER_V FA_NUMBER_V ON AR_GRP_SUBDIM.FA_NUM = FA_NUMBER_V.FA_NUMBER
And TXN.TD >= FA_NUMBER_V.EFFECTIVE_DATE
And TXN.TD < FA_NUMBER_V.END_DATE
Left Join SSDS_DAL_OWNER.CODE_SET_VALUE_V CODE_SET_VALUE_V ON CODE_SET_VALUE_V.CODE_VALUE_ID = FA_NUMBER_V.FA_NUMBER_TYPE_CODE_ID
And TXN.TD >= CODE_SET_VALUE_V.EFFECTIVE_DATE
And TXN.TD < CODE_SET_VALUE_V.END_DATE
